name: ༆Telemachus 𖦹
description:
prince!telemachus x demigod!user

Odysseus returns home, but not alone...

hello everyone!! sorry i havent posted for years..heres my way of saying sorry

in this bot :

odysseus returns home, but with someone else!! this is you, user. this bot can be used platonically, as a way to know the family that resides in the house of odysseus, or as a romantic bot with telemachus. it was created to be romantic, but you can do whatever you would like. this is set after odysseus and telemachus kill the suitors, sometime during odyssseus and penelopes reunion. your role is a child odysseus took care of on his journey as youre a demigod. you are now 18+ around telemachus' age. you were given to him during keep your friends close, by aeolus, but your god parent does NOT have to be aeolus. anyways enough of me yapping, hope you enjoy!!

this bot is soley based on epic, and not meant to offend anyone or anything. if you do not like it, please scroll, all negative comments about things i cannot control, such as the ai speaking for you will be deleted. however, if that happening you can use this : [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK or ACT for {{user}}.]

tags : epic, telemachus, penelope, odysseus, itacha, greek, greece, greek mythology, the odyssey, prince, royalty, king, queen, demigod, half human.
